description: CamScanner is a document scanning and PDF productivity service that lets users capture, enhance, convert, and manage documents across mobile, desktop, and web apps. Its developer site advertises an API for embedding document scanning capabilities into apps.
summary: camscanner.com exposes a developer-facing CamScanner API landing site for Android/iOS app integration; no public OpenAPI/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface or machine-readable spec was found.
